task_completion.description: Access the CSV file to read the Finance Department's fixed asset register.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application, text editor, or terminal displaying the contents of 'finance_fixed_assets.csv', showing columns like Asset ID, Cost Center, and Status.
The OpenMaint dashboard or UI is visible in the web browser, indicating a successful login (admin/admin).

task_completion.description: Update the description of a uniquely matched active asset (e.g., EQ-SYNC-001 or EQ-SYNC-003).
task_completion.visual_evidence: An asset record in OpenMaint (like EQ-SYNC-001) showing its description appended with the format ' | ERP-ID: [AssetID] | CC: [CostCenter]' and its status set to Active.

task_completion.description: Update the status and description of the written-off asset (EQ-SYNC-002).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The asset record for EQ-SYNC-002 in OpenMaint showing its status changed to 'Retired' or 'Disposed' (or similar inactive state) and its description appended with the ERP-ID and CC.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Maintenance Requests/Tickets section to handle the duplicate serial trap.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMaint UI showing the Maintenance module or a new, blank Maintenance Request/Ticket form being opened.

task_completion.description: Create a High priority Maintenance Request for the duplicate serial number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filled or submitted Maintenance Request/Ticket in OpenMaint with Priority set to 'High' and the description exactly or closely matching 'Data Integrity Conflict: Duplicate Serial SN-DUP-999'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the OpenMaint graphical user interface to perform the updates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through the OpenMaint web interface, filling out forms, and saving records, rather than using terminal curl commands or database scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the UI changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be open and used to alter the DOM text to simulate task completion.

integrity.description: The maintenance ticket was created within the actual OpenMaint system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ticket description and priority must be entered into the OpenMaint ticket creation form, not just typed into a text editor or a disconnected web page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file is located at /home/ga/Desktop/finance_fixed_assets.csv. The target assets for unique matches are EQ-SYNC-001, EQ-SYNC-002, and EQ-SYNC-003. EQ-SYNC-002 corresponds to a 'WRITTEN_OFF' status in the CSV and must be updated to 'Retired', 'Disposed', or 'Inactive'. The trap serial number is 'SN-DUP-999', which is shared by multiple assets. The agent must NOT update assets with this serial, but instead create a High priority Maintenance Request with the description 'Data Integrity Conflict: Duplicate Serial SN-DUP-999'.
